About Coach Mayers

A player who became
a coach for a reason.

This system wasn't built in a classroom. It was built through a lifetime in the game — as a player, as a student of the science, and as a coach who has worked at every level from youth development to the New York Yankees.

"Baseball was everything to me growing up in the Bahamas. I played in international tournaments representing my country, earned a scholarship to come to America, played at Christ School in North Carolina, and went on to play college ball at Belmont Abbey. I gave everything I had to that game.

But my career was marked by a string of minor injuries that kept pulling me back — and through all of it, I always felt like I had more in the tank. More speed. More power. More I never got to show.

That feeling never left me. And instead of letting it become a regret, I turned it into a mission. I went back to school, earned my Master of Science in Exercise and Nutrition Sciences, got certified as a CSCS, worked inside the New York Yankees organization, and spent years learning exactly why athletes get held back — and what it actually takes to unlock what they're capable of.

Now I build programs that give athletes what I wish I'd had. Not generic plans. Not cookie-cutter templates. A real system, built around who you are and what you need — so you show up to your season with nothing left to wonder."

— Ian Mayers, MS, CSCS · Founder, Coach Mayers Performance

2019 — Where it started
Bahamas · MacFit & I-Elite Baseball
Began coaching back home, taking on S&C responsibilities with I-Elite Bahamas — a development program helping athletes earn international prospect opportunities with MLB organizations.
2019–2021 — Collegiate Environments
Lenoir-Rhyne · Queens · USF
Built performance experience across three college programs through internships at Lenoir-Rhyne University, Queens University of Charlotte, and the University of South Florida.
2021–2025 — Elite Multi-Sport Coaching
Overtime Athletes · Master of Science & CSCS
Earned a Master of Science in Exercise and Nutrition Sciences from the University of Tampa while coaching 300+ athletes — youth through professional — across baseball, softball, football, basketball, and golf, both in person and remotely.
2022 — Professional Organization
New York Yankees
Worked as a Performance Science Assistant in a professional MLB environment — operating VALD force plates, GPS systems, and athlete monitoring tools alongside sports science, strength, and medical staff.
Strength Coaching
Force Plate Testing · VALD Technology
Speed & Power Development

What this system produces

Results that show
up on the field.

Every program is built around measurable outcomes — velocity, power, speed, and strength that transfer to your sport.

300+
Athletes Developed
Youth through professional — baseball, softball, football, basketball, and golf — in person and remotely since 2019.
20+
College Commits
Athletes trained through this system have gone on to earn college scholarships and commitments at programs across the country.
94+
mph Velocity Developed
Multiple athletes developed from the low 70s and 80s to 94+ mph through structured, phase-based programming — not random bullpen sessions.
88 mph to 98 mph.
Aaron Watson went from 88 mph to 98 mph and was selected as a 2nd round pick by the Cincinnati Reds. That's not luck — that's what a real development system does to an athlete who commits to the process.

How it works

Simple process.
Real results.

01
Purchase or Apply
$150 tier is instant. $225 and $300 start with a short intake form so everything is built specifically around you — your sport, position, season timeline, and goals.
02
Onboarding Call
We get on a call. I learn your background, what's at stake this season, and exactly what you need. That conversation shapes everything that gets built for you.
03
Program in 48 Hours
Your fully periodized program lands in Bridge Athletic — phase-based, sport-specific, built around your season calendar with coaching cues and video demos on every session.
04
Train, Track, Evolve
Log sessions. I monitor and adjust programming across phases. Nothing is static — the program evolves with you. By the time your season starts, you'll be the most prepared athlete in your lineup.

Free 30-Minute Call

Not sure which tier is right for you?

Book a free 30-minute call. We'll talk through your goals, your sport, and your season — and figure out exactly what you need.

Book a Free Call

What athletes say

The results speak
for themselves.

From professional MLB players to high school athletes chasing scholarships — here's what working with this system actually produces.

Ian's guidance not only saved my career — it rejuvenated it. He looked at my force plate numbers alongside my old hitting videos and immediately identified that I was trying to be quick instead of letting my body generate power properly. That insight led to a completely tailored program and a new minor league contract. Under his mentorship, I've never felt better or more prepared as an athlete.

Chavez Young
Professional Baseball Player · Milwaukee Brewers Organization
New MiLB Contract Secured

My SLG went from .277 to .351 and my OPS jumped from .639 to .727. Those numbers caught the attention of scouts and earned me an invitation to Major League Spring Training camp. Ian became more than a coach — he was a steady anchor through every high and low of that season.

Christian Cairo
Professional Baseball · Cleveland Guardians
MLB Spring Training Invite

Ian has been instrumental in my development — enhancing my speed, rotational power, and arm health through real data, not guesswork. He kept consistent communication throughout the off-season, regularly providing personalized feedback and adjustments. I surpassed my performance targets and hit ten home runs in a season I never thought possible.

Josh Palacios
Professional Baseball · Pittsburgh Pirates
+10 Home Runs · +5 Stolen Bases

Coach Mayers took my game to a whole new level. He helped propel me to the collegiate level where I was able to earn a scholarship and perform. His skill set and approach to what each athlete individually needs is unmatched anywhere I go. Great guy and an amazing coach.

Frank Martinez
Baseball · Ave Maria University
College Scholarship Earned

I came to Coach Mayers the summer of my junior year committed to NC A&T with a fastball in the mid-80s. By the end of that summer I was hitting 94+ and turning heads at tournaments. I went from NC A&T to getting an MLB Combine invite my senior year and ultimately signing to play SEC baseball at the University of Missouri. Coach Mayers changed the trajectory of my career.

Trey Lawrence
RHP/SS · University of Missouri (SEC) · MLB Combine Invitee
Mid-80s → 94+ mph · SEC Baseball

Amidst a sea of individuals vying to enter the sports industry, Ian Mayers stood out immediately. His ability to identify talent, build meaningful relationships with athletes, and translate complex data into real results makes him invaluable. I wholeheartedly endorse him to any athlete serious about their development.

Kent Matthes
MLBPA Certified Agent · Stadium Ventures · Formerly CAA & IMG
Agent Endorsement
